postmark.Subject: Refinance — Sarah Chen
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

Refi for Sarah Chen at 4421 Kingsway, Vancouver, BC V5R 5T7. 65% LTV, $525k requested.

Full document package is ~95MB — hosted on Google Drive:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1aBcDe-fGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123

Link permission set to anyone-with-link can view. Includes loan app, statements, appraisal, NOA, ID.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.

Jonathan Ferrara
Ferrara Financial
Lic. #M16002271
